articles.title: XRP Makes Its Way To Injective Ecosystem As IIP-238 Passes
articles.description: In a momentous decision, the Injective community has voted in favor of IIP-238, a proposal that solidifies the integration of XRP into the expanding Injective ecosystem. This groundbreaking collaboration between Injective and Ripple heralds a significant milestone in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector. With resounding support from the community, the integration of XRP into the […]

articles.title: XRP Unseats Bitcoin As The Most Traded Crypto Asset, Demonstrating High Confidence
articles.description: The tides are shifting the crypto market of late. Frenzied trading has pushed XRP to garner trading volumes higher than those of Bitcoin, otherwise leading the pack in trading volumes.

articles.title: Chiliz (CHZ) Received US Approval for "FAN TOKEN" Brand!
articles.description: Chiliz received approval from the USA for the FAN TOKEN brand. CHZ continues to trade below its ATH of $0.92 at $0.079. Continue Reading: Chiliz (CHZ) Received US Approval for "FAN TOKEN" Brand!

articles.title: XRP Is Getting Listed on One of the World’s Most Prestigious Crypto Exchanges
articles.description: LCX, the Liechtenstein Cryptoassets Exchange, is a fintech company that has been contributing to capital markets since 2018. With five years of innovation, LCX has significantly influenced the digital asset industry by delivering a robust blockchain infrastructure, characterized by exceptional security, efficiency, and transparency. The company has secured nine regulatory registrations in...

articles.title: Judge Orders Ripple And SEC To Schedule Settlement Conference
articles.description: In the ongoing legal battle between Ripple Labs and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), District Judge Analisa Torres has referred the case to Magistrate Judge Sarah Netburn for General Pretrial, including the crucial aspects of scheduling, discovery, non-dispositive pretrial motions, and settlement. The General Pretrial refers to a pre-trial hearing where the attorneys […]

articles.title: South Korea’s Shinhan Bank tests stablecoin payments on Hedera network
articles.description: South Korea's Shinhan Bank completed a feasibility test for stablecoin remittance payments using Hedera's distributed ledger technology.

articles.title: Why XRP Is Poised To Wildly Outperform Bitcoin And Ethereum
articles.description: The recent ruling in favor of XRP has dispelled any negative regulatory challenges it had been facing, resulting in a head-turning rally over nearly 100% in 24 hours. Enough people are now paying attention to Ripple’s cryptocurrency, that it’s starting to pull capital from Bitcoin and Ethereum. And according to the charts of the three […]
